specific_question: In Q3 2025, how many cross-platform asset integration dashboards did the Asset Lifecycle Manager develop to support real-time data synchronization for AI-enabled digital twin simulations?
answer: According to internal reports, Olivia Martinez and her team deployed 12 cross-platform dashboards connecting asset data from manufacturing, design, and supply chain systems to enhance digital twin integration.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
